# `dnsight config`

Inspect and validate dnsight configuration.

## Subcommands

| Command | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [`example`](example/index.md) | Print a sample dnsight configuration file. |
| [`migrate`](migrate/index.md) | Migrate a dnsight configuration file to the latest version. |
| [`validate`](validate/index.md) | Validate a dnsight configuration file. |
